title: The Bedroom Studio
description: Aman recorded his first Python and CSS tutorials while finishing his software engineering degree. The goal was simple: explain topics the way he wished they had been explained to him.

title: The 100,000 Milestone
description: After graduating and working as a senior engineer at a top tech company, Aman focused his channel on system architecture and React. The community grew rapidly as the practical, project-based content resonated.

title: Going Full-Time Creative
description: Aman left his software architecture position to build Tech Master full-time. He launched the MasterClass suite, which quickly grew to host over 50,000 student enrollments.

title: Global Stage Speaking Tour
description: Invited as a guest keynote speaker at TEDx, Google DevFest, and international universities to talk about the future of tech education, AI developer tools, and building a developer brand.

title: 2 Million Strong & Beyond
description: Reaching over 2.5 million subscribers on YouTube, launching an interactive coding web app, and partnering with tech giants like Nvidia and GitHub to offer free educational courses to underrepresented students.
